channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 p
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers will start third different quarterback this season in Sunday finale at Arizona
item.description: Josh Dobbs will start in place of an injured Brock Purdy in the 49ers' season finale Sunday at the Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Officials postpone Sugar Bowl in the wake of apparent terror attack on Bourbon Street
item.description: The 2025 Sugar Bowl in New Orleans has been postponed just hours before kickoff Wednesday after at least 10 people were killed and dozens more were injured in what federal officials are investigating as an act of terrorism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs to start Carson Wentz at QB against Denver, which would clinch a playoff berth with a win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs will start backup Carson Wentz at quarterback on Sunday in Denver in a game that means nothing to Kansas City, which has already clinched the No. 1 seed in the AFC playoffs, but could mean everything to the Broncos.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How the Chicago Blackhawks brought the St. Louis Blues to life
item.description: As the St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks gear up for the 2025 NHL Winter Classic, it's worth revisiting a fascinating piece of hockey history: The Blues franchise, as St. Louis knows it today, might not exist without a helping hand from their cross-state rival.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago brings losing streak into matchup with Dallas
item.description: Dallas Stars (20-13-1, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (12-22-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Sunday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks look to break their three-game skid when they play the Dallas Stars.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4
